title: STpa
description: A modern, lightweight, and fully configurable TPA plugin featuring GUI‑based and chat‑based request handling, instant toggle commands, and an intuitive toggle GUI for complete teleport control.
body:
🚀 Advanced Teleport Request System
This plugin delivers a clean, powerful, and user‑friendly teleport request experience designed for both casual and competitive Minecraft servers. It combines GUI interaction, chat commands, and instant toggle controls into one seamless system — no clutter, no confusion.

Whether players prefer clicking through a GUI or typing commands in chat, everything works smoothly and efficiently.

🎮 Multiple Ways to Accept TPA Requests
Players can accept teleport requests using:

Interactive GUI

Chat‑based commands

Instant toggle commands

This flexibility ensures compatibility with every playstyle and server type.

🧩 TPA Toggle GUI
A dedicated Toggle GUI allows players to manage teleport permissions visually.

From one clean interface, players can:

Enable or disable incoming TPA requests

Control TPAHERE permissions

Instantly see their current teleport status

No commands required — just click and manage.

⚡ Instant Toggle Commands
For power users and competitive environments, instant toggles are available:

/tpatoggle – Enable or disable incoming TPA requests instantly
![SETTINGS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41fa3c6de4af753bcbf1b20602044ab890998e65.png)
/tpaheretoggle – Toggle TPAHERE requests instantly

No confirmations, no menus — fast and efficient.

🛠️ Core Features
GUI‑based TPA accept system
![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6cd906be337d670e29d0cd2dae7d18127f2beed.png)

Chat‑based TPA accept support
![ChatCilckable](https://imagedelivery.net/W9K_l6ndK9x4x8m3rurakg/8e38897b-60a0-4196-9d77-e6614358d600/original)

Dedicated TPA Toggle GUI

Instant toggle commands

Lightweight and optimized

Clean permission handling

Player‑friendly UX

Fully server‑side controlled

No unnecessary dependencies

🧠 Designed for Performance & Simplicity
The plugin is built with:

Minimal performance impact

Clean logic flow

Simple command structure

Easy integration into existing servers

Perfect for Survival, Lifesteal, SMP, PvP, and Network servers.

🔐 Player Control & Privacy
Players stay in full control of their teleport permissions.
No forced requests, no spam — everything is opt‑in and toggle‑based.

📦 Why Choose This Plugin?
Modern GUI experience

Fast toggle commands

Clean and professional design

Ideal for public and private servers

Easy for players, powerful for admins

🧩 Compatibility
Works on modern Spigot / Paper servers

Supports latest Minecraft versions

Designed to be future‑proof

⭐ Final Notes
If you're looking for a professional‑grade TPA system that balances ease of use, speed, and player control, this plugin is built exactly for that purpose.
